artwork_unavailable_desc: This artwork is not accessible in your current session.
title_prev_artwork: Previous artwork by the same artist
title_next_artwork: Next artwork by the same artist
same_artist_nav_prev_caption:
Previous artwork
by the same artist
same_artist_nav_next_caption:
Next artwork
by the same artist
ai_select_style: Select how AI should talk to you
ai_styles_error: ALERT: no rows in prompt_style (or access denied).
ai_styles_error_rls: Check Supabase RLS policies for the prompt_style table.
mediation_text_missing: No generated text for this style.
mediation_not_available_in_lang: The mediation for this artwork is not yet available in English.
emotion_section_title: The emotion felt in front of this artwork
emotions_empty_error: No buttons shown: the emotions table returns no rows with icone_emotion and name_emotion.
heart_rating_subtitle:
It's not the quality of the artwork being rated,
just YOUR feeling
comment_modal_hint: It will be saved with your feedback when you tap Submit.
comment_empty: Please enter a comment before saving.
quick_feedback_missing: Pick an emotion and rate from 1 to 5 hearts to share how you feel.
quick_feedback_missing_emotion: Choose the emotion that fits you best, just below.
quick_feedback_missing_heart: Tap the hearts to rate your feeling (1 to 5).
validation_thanks:
Thank you {{name}}, it's saved.
Shall we scan another artwork's QR code?
exit_thanks_with_agency: AIMEDIArt.com and {{agency}} thank you for your visit.
exit_thanks_solo: AIMEDIArt.com thanks you for your visit.
exit_message:
We were delighted to present this exhibition to you.
We hope to see you again very soon! It was a pleasure!
error_missing_data: Technical error: missing data for recording (visitor_id/artwork_id/emotion/note).
error_verify_insert: Uncertain insertion: unable to verify persistence in database.
error_no_row: No row found after insertion. Check that you are consulting the right Supabase project and table.
emotions_db_error: Unable to load emotions from the database.
emotions_columns_empty: The icone_emotion / name_emotion columns are empty in the database.
tts_consent_desc: The app will read the mediation text aloud. If you are in a public place, we recommend using headphones. Reading starts after your confirmation.

indoor_audio.title: Audio in the exhibition rooms
indoor_audio.courtesy_message: For everyone's comfort in the galleries, please use headphones (wired or Bluetooth). If you don't have any, turn your device volume down to the minimum before listening to the audioguide.
indoor_audio.ban_warning: If you disturb other visitors by playing sound aloud, the exhibition staff may suspend your audio access for the rest of your visit.
indoor_audio.ban_message: Audio suspended by the museum. Out of respect for the quiet of the exhibition, speaker playback is not allowed. Please plug in your headphones and contact the front desk to restore your access.
